package handler

import (
    "net/http"

    "acme/project/internal/service"
    "acme/project/internal/transport"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type UserService interface {
    Create(req transport.CreateUserRequest) (transport.UserResponse, error)
}

type Handler struct {
    service UserService
}

func (h *Handler) Create(c *gin.Context) {
    var req transport.CreateUserRequest
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&req)
    resp, _ := h.service.Create(req)
    c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, resp)
}
